items.prod_subtitle: Six-seater with a sleek glass top. Modern dining, easy to clean.
items.prod_description: A 6-seater glass-top dining table brings a sleek, modern look to mealtimes for the whole family. The smooth glass surface wipes clean in seconds and pairs with comfortable seating for everyday dinners and get-togethers. It is a stylish choice that keeps the dining area bright and contemporary.

items.care_instructions: Wipe with dry/soft cloth; avoid water & direct sunlight

items.prod_subtitle: Compact window air conditioner for quick cooling. Fits a single window.
items.prod_description: A window AC cools a single room quickly and slots into one window frame without major installation. It is popular for bedrooms and rented homes where a split unit is not practical, delivering steady relief through hot summers. People switch it on for a comfortable night's sleep or a cool work-from-home setup, and it is simple to run with a basic remote or panel.
items.care_instructions: Wipe exterior with dry cloth; servicing by authorized technician

items.prod_subtitle: Fabric-upholstered 6x6 ft king with storage. Plush headboard, hidden space.
items.prod_description: An upholstered 6x6 ft king bed pairs a soft, padded headboard with handy under-bed storage. The plush finish makes leaning back to read or watch TV comfortable, while the hidden space swallows bedding and luggage. It brings a touch of luxury to the bedroom without sacrificing practicality.

items.prod_subtitle: Power backup with a single battery. Keeps lights and fans running through cuts.
items.prod_description: An inverter with a single battery keeps the essentials running such as lights, fans, Wi-Fi and chargers when the power goes out. It kicks in automatically so there is no scrambling for candles, making it invaluable in areas with frequent cuts. Households rely on it to keep evenings comfortable and devices charged, switching back seamlessly once the mains return.
items.native_dimensions: Inverter + 1 tubular battery footprint; not in catalogue
items.care_instructions: Wipe exterior with dry cloth; servicing by authorized technician

items.prod_subtitle: 40-inch smart LED TV with streaming apps. A living-room favourite.
items.prod_description: A 40-inch smart LED TV is a living-room favourite, streaming films, shows and sports with apps built right in. The size suits most halls and bedrooms, big enough to feel immersive without dominating the room. People use it for family movie nights, casting from phones and catching up on their watchlist over Wi-Fi.

items.prod_description: A double-door fridge offers generous, separated cooling with a roomy fridge below and a dedicated freezer up top. Families use it to stock a week's groceries, keep leftovers fresh and store plenty of frozen items and ice. The extra space and organised shelves make big shops and meal prep far easier to manage.
